name: @generata/coding
description: Spec-driven coding pipeline: dream, plan, audit, code, review.

requiredBins.name: terminal-notifier
requiredBins.hint: Optional, macOS only: brew install terminal-notifier

postInstall:
1. NOTES.md is pre-populated with starter ideas - edit, replace, or add your own
  2. Run: pnpm generata workflow build-project

The workflow picks one idea at random, writes a SPEC and PLAN, builds the project under projects/<name>/, and removes the used idea from NOTES.md.
